features: [Universal Compatibility] The majority of 26-70 inch (66-178 cm) flat and curved TVs up to 45 kg can be supported by the PERLESMITH TV wall bracket. Compatible VESA dimensions include 100x100/100x200/200x100/200x200/200x300/200x400/300x200/300x300/300x400/400x200/400x 300/400x400mm. Before making a purchase, please confirm the VESA dimensions, weight, and size of your television

[Optimal Viewing Angle] The optimal viewing angle is provided by our swivel tv wall bracket, which has a tilt of 10° upwards / -15° downwards, a swivel of 45° to the left and right, and a rotation of +/- 3°. Choose the perfect angle for comfortable and optimized screen viewing

[Saves Valuable Space] Our 55 inch tv wall bracket can be pulled back to the wall up to 87mm in the initial position and extended to a maximum of 403mm from the wall. Our tv bracket saves valuable space and lends a neat and tidy appearance to your household

[Durable and Safe Construction] This swivel 65 inch tv wall bracket is made from high grade cold rolled steel, the tv wall mount has 2 strong steel arms which can hold TVs weighing up to 45 kg. Don't worry, your TV is in safe hands
[Easy Installation] We provide wall template, spirit level and standard assembly materials to ensure a simple and convenient installation. Included 5 cable ties make your cables neater
description: Product Description PSMFK4-E PERLESMITH TV Bracket, True Immersion at Multiple Viewing Angles! Ultra strong to protect your TV Tested to hold 4 times the weight they're rated to based on UL standard and made with high grade steel, our heavy-duty TV bracket can hold LED, LCD, OLED, Plasma flat and curved screen TVs up to 45kg . Customize your special viewing experience This TV wall bracket comes with 25° tilt (+10° up/-15° down) , +/-45° swivel (max. swivel depends on TV size) and +/-3° level adjust for maximum viewing flexibility and customize your special viewing experience. Let you really immerse yourself in leisure time. Save more space This articulating TV wall mount is built with an arm that retracts a mere 87mm from the wall and extends up to a maximum of 403mm . Saving you some valuable space and adding a nice, neat appearance to your household. Purchase Tips 1. Is this wall bracket suitable for my TV? As long as your TV meets the following three conditions, it will be compatible with this mount: the screen size is between 26 and 70 inches, the weight does not exceed 45kg, and the VESA mounting pattern is between 100x100 mm and 400x400 mm. 2. What does VESA mean? VESA refers to the distance between the four mounting holes on the back of your television. Please measure both the horizontal and vertical spacing (in millimeters). This bracket supports VESA patterns ranging from 100x100 mm mm to 400x400 mm. 3. What types of walls can this bracket be installed on? It can be installed on brick walls, concrete walls, and wooden studs. 4. Can it be installed on a plasterboard wall? No, it cannot be installed on a plasterboard wall alone—additional structural support (such as wooden studs or masonry) is required. 5. What if the bracket blocks the TV's ports? Just use the included spacers and longer screws to create extra space behind your TV for your cables. Full Motion TV Bracket Your Other Choices 45kg Max. load capacity 60kg 400x400mm Max.
